sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23101" key="guro/mantis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γῡρόμαντις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, (γῦρις᾽</foreign> <sense id="n23101.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀλευρόμαντις</ref></xr>, dub. l. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:2:69" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.69</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
